sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30752" key="e)qeirolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐθειρολόγος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n30752.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tweezer, Hermes</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0005.tlg001.perseus-grc1:38:282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.282</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
